raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California is operating with a historic surplus.",
    "The state is working on issues that include housing production, valley fever, and climate change.",
    "SB 1308 clarifies compliance with Buy America policy by prohibiting public schools from purchasing certain non-domestic agricultural products.",
    "SB 625 establishes the California Investment and Innovation Program to provide grants to promote outcomes within low-income communities.",
    "SB 1349 expands eligibility for the New Employment Tax Credit to include historically marginalized groups.",
    "SB 1326 allows the state to enter into an interstate agreement for cannabis transportation across state lines.",
    "SB 1101 requires the establishment of a Carbon Capture, Utilization and Storage (CCUS) program to commercialize carbon capture technologies.",
    "SB 1109 will increase the pace of removing forest waste material to stop carbon at the source and utilize it for energy needs.",
    "SB 1123 directs the development of a web-based resource for identifying state-funded resilience programs, ensuring equitable distribution of resources.",
    "SB 3 requires the development of a local control and accountability plan (LCAP) portal for analyzing LCAPs adopted by local agencies.",
    "SB 532 expands rights for disadvantaged students regarding graduation requirements.",
    "SB 558 establishes a task force to examine the needs of farmworkers during disasters.",
    "SB 1142 establishes a grant program to support organizations providing logistical support for abortion access.",
    "SB 1231 will develop a diagnostic manual to improve healthcare outcomes for Valley Fever patients.",
    "SB 6 authorizes housing as an allowable use on certain office and retail zoned parcels.",
    "SB 490 creates a Technical Assistance Program to support affordable housing preservation.",
    "SB 1410 mandates a study on the implementation and impact of vehicle miles traveled (VMT) analysis for construction.",
    "SB 1449 creates a grant program encouraging local governments to annex unincorporated areas.",
    "SB 1155 sets guidelines for time-limited demands issued to insurance companies to expedite resolution of claims.",
    "SB 382 adds commercial exploitation of a minor to existing laws for restraining orders.",
    "SB 1171 creates a hearsay exception for medical diagnosis statements in domestic violence cases.",
    "SB 1268 makes investigative information available to families of minors who have died during law enforcement investigations."
  ]
}
```
